note_en: Predictions are my (Opus 4.8) own reads — for entertainment, not betting advice. 1X2 odds from FanDuel/bet365 (30 Jun); score odds are market-derived estimates. Scratch a panel to reveal my exact score call.
note_zh: 预测为我（Opus 4.8）的个人研判——仅供娱乐，不构成博彩建议。胜平负赔率来源：FanDuel/bet365（6 月 30 日）；比分赔率为市场推算估值。刮开面板揭晓我的精准比分预测。

record.note_en: Opus match-outcome calls scored from Matchday 3 onward. Updated daily. ⭐ = exact scoreline. ✓ = correct outcome.
record.note_zh: 自第三轮起对 Opus 胜负预测计分，每日更新。⭐ = 比分全中，✓ = 结果正确。

champions.reason_en: Demolished Sweden 3-0 (Mbappé brace) to reach R16 — most complete performance of the tournament. Next: Paraguay (July 4, Philly). Clear favourites.
champions.reason_zh: 3-0 横扫瑞典（姆巴佩梅开二度）晋级 16 强——本届杯赛最完整的一场发挥。下战：巴拉圭（7 月 4 日，费城）。夺冠热门。

champions.reason_en: Won Group H (7 pts, clean sheet); R32 vs Austria July 2, LA. Yamal's creativity and Baena's energy keep the press relentless. Comfortable favourites.
champions.reason_zh: 夺 H 组头名（7 分，零失球）；7 月 2 日 32 强战奥地利，洛杉矶。亚马尔的创造力与巴埃纳的能量令逼抢不息。强势热门。

champions.reason_en: Perfect group (9 pts, Messi record 7th WC goal); R32 vs Cape Verde July 3, Miami. Path as open as it gets before a likely quarter-final test.
champions.reason_zh: 全胜小组赛（9 分，梅西创史无前例第 7 次世界杯进球）；7 月 3 日 32 强战佛得角，迈阿密。签位极其宽松。

champions.reason_en: Beat Japan 2-1 in R32 (Casemiro, Martinelli) — clinical and composed. R16 vs Norway (Haaland) July 5, MetLife. Potent attack, serious title ambitions.
champions.reason_zh: 32 强 2-1 淘汰日本（卡塞米罗、马丁内利）——精准从容。16 强 7 月 5 日战挪威（哈兰德），大都会球场。强力锋线，冠军野心十足。

champions.reason_en: Won Group L (7 pts); R32 vs DR Congo today, Atlanta. Kane in form; manageable draw opens the path to a quarter-final with potential.
champions.reason_zh: 夺 L 组头名（7 分）；今日 32 强战刚果（金），亚特兰大。凯恩状态佳；签位良好，有望杀入八强。

champions.reason_en: Shocked Netherlands on pens (Bounou saves, Diop 91' equaliser). R16 vs Canada July 4, Houston. The Atlas Lions are a genuine dark horse — defensive solidity meets clinical finishing.
champions.reason_zh: 点球力克荷兰（布努神扑，迪奥普 91 分钟扳平）。16 强 7 月 4 日战加拿大，休斯顿。阿特拉斯雄狮是真正的黑马——防守稳固与精准终结兼备。

players.name: Kylian Mbappé
players.reason_en: Brace in France's 3-0 rout of Sweden — now leading the Golden Boot race alongside Haaland. Paraguay next in R16. If France go deep, the tally will climb fast.
players.reason_zh: 法国 3-0 横扫瑞典中梅开二度——与哈兰德并列金靴领跑。16 强迎战巴拉圭。若法国走远，进球数将急速攀升。

players.name: Lionel Messi
players.reason_en: Free-kick goal vs Jordan — record 7 straight WC goals. R32 vs Cape Verde July 3, Miami. Eyes both Golden Boot and the trophy; sign of the times.
players.reason_zh: 任意球破约旦——连续 7 场世界杯进球，史无前例。7 月 3 日 32 强战佛得角，迈阿密。金靴与冠军皆在视野中。

players.name: Erling Haaland
players.reason_en: Scored in Norway's 2-1 win over Ivory Coast; 7 goals for the tournament. R16 vs Brazil July 5 — toughest test yet. One Haaland run and Norway can surprise.
players.reason_zh: 挪威 2-1 战胜科特迪瓦中再度进球；本届合计 7 球。16 强 7 月 5 日战巴西——最艰难的挑战。哈兰德一次爆发可令挪威震惊世界。

players.name: Lamine Yamal
players.reason_en: Spain won Group H; R32 vs Austria July 2, LA. Creative spark in a side built to go deep — if Spain reach the semis, Yamal's stat line will dazzle.
players.reason_zh: 西班牙夺 H 组头名；7 月 2 日 32 强战奥地利，洛杉矶。志在深入球队中的创造力核心——若西班牙杀入四强，亚马尔数据将令人瞠目。

players.name: Harry Kane
players.reason_en: England won Group L; R32 vs DR Congo today, Atlanta. Kane reliable from open play and set pieces — needs goals to build a Golden Boot push.
players.reason_zh: 英格兰夺 L 组头名；今日 32 强战刚果（金），亚特兰大。凯恩运动战与定位球均稳——需要进球推进金靴竞争。

players.name: Mohamed Salah
players.reason_en: Egypt advanced 2nd in Group G; R32 vs Australia July 3, Dallas. Salah capable of lighting up any stage; Egypt are a dark-horse to reach the quarters.
players.reason_zh: 埃及以 G 组次席出线；7 月 3 日 32 强战澳大利亚，达拉斯。萨拉赫在任何舞台都能爆发；埃及是八强黑马。

fixtures.reason_en: 1L vs 3K. England topped their group with Kane in form; DR Congo showed quality (3-1 Uzbekistan) but the step up to England is significant. Straightforward English win.
fixtures.reason_zh: L 组头名对 K 组第三。英格兰头名出线，凯恩进球状态佳；刚果（金）展现质素（3-1 乌兹别克斯坦）但对阵英格兰跨度太大。英格兰轻取。

fixtures.reason_en: 1G vs 3I. Belgium won their group convincingly (5-1 NZ); Senegal made best-third via a 5-0 Iraq win but Belgian depth is clearly superior. Expect Senegal to push before Belgium pull clear.
fixtures.reason_zh: G 组头名对 I 组第三。比利时强势夺头名（5-1 新西兰）；塞内加尔凭 5-0 伊拉克以第三身份出线，但比利时阵容深度明显占优。预计塞内加尔会竞争一番，但比利时最终拉开。

fixtures.reason_en: 1D vs 3B. USA at Levi's Stadium, San Francisco — co-host home support. Despite the Turkey shock loss, USA won Group D. Bosnia advanced as best-third; USA's depth and crowd advantage should prevail.
fixtures.reason_zh: D 组头名对 B 组第三。美国坐镇旧金山利维斯球场——东道主主场优势。尽管爆冷负土耳其，美国仍夺 D 组头名。波黑以第三身份出线；美国阵容深度与主场优势应占上风。

fixtures.reason_en: 1H vs 2J. Spain won Group H convincingly with Yamal and Baena sparkling; Austria scraped 2nd in Group J with just 4 pts. Spanish technical superiority should make this comfortable.
fixtures.reason_zh: H 组头名对 J 组次席。西班牙全胜夺头名，亚马尔与巴埃纳灵光闪现；奥地利在艰难的 J 组仅凭 4 分险夺次席。西班牙技术优势将令比赛轻松。

fixtures.reason_en: 2K vs 2L. Euro 2016 final rematch — Ronaldo vs Modric. Portugal's individual quality and attacking depth edge Croatia's defensive organisation. Expect intensity; Portugal to edge a close tie.
fixtures.reason_zh: K 组次席对 L 组次席。欧洲杯 2016 决赛重演——C 罗对阵莫德里奇。葡萄牙的个人质量与进攻厚度险胜克罗地亚的防守体系。预计全程高强度；葡萄牙险胜。

fixtures.reason_en: 1B vs 3J. Switzerland won Group B convincingly (7 pts, 3-1 Canada); Algeria advanced as best-third after the 3-3 draw with Austria. Swiss organisation and discipline should control this tie.
fixtures.reason_zh: B 组头名对 J 组第三。瑞士强势夺 B 组头名（7 分，3-1 加拿大）；阿尔及利亚凭 3-3 奥地利后最佳第三出线。瑞士的阵型严密与纪律性应主导比赛。

fixtures.reason_en: 2D vs 2G. Salah-led Egypt edged Group G (5 pts); Australia 2nd in D with 4 pts. Egypt's composure and Salah's invention are a class above. Egypt to advance.
fixtures.reason_zh: D 组次席对 G 组次席。萨拉赫领衔的埃及险夺 G 组次席（5 分）；澳大利亚 4 分居 D 组次席。埃及的老练与萨拉赫的创造力明显更强。埃及晋级。

fixtures.reason_en: 1J vs 2H. Argentina's perfect group (9 pts, Messi record 7th WC goal) meets Cape Verde, who scraped 2nd with 0-0 Saudi Arabia. Argentine attacking quality is in a different class; comfortable cruise to R16.
fixtures.reason_zh: J 组头名对 H 组次席。阿根廷全胜（9 分，梅西第 7 次世界杯进球创历史）迎战仅凭 0-0 沙特出线的佛得角。阿根廷进攻实力与众不同；轻松晋级 16 强。

fixtures.reason_en: 1K vs 3L. Colombia topped Group K (7 pts, including 0-0 Portugal); Ghana advanced as best-third from L with 4 pts. Díaz and Rodríguez provide creativity and the class gap is clear.
fixtures.reason_zh: K 组头名对 L 组第三。哥伦比亚夺 K 组头名（7 分，含 0-0 葡萄牙）；加纳以 L 组第三（4 分）出线。迪亚斯与罗德里格斯提供创造力，实力差距一目了然。

fixtures.reason_en: R32 winners Canada (1-0 South Africa) vs Morocco (pens Netherlands). Morocco are defensively superb and a genuine dark horse, but Canada's North-American home-continent edge and clinical counter-punch give them a narrow advantage. Tight low-scoring affair.
fixtures.reason_zh: 32 强胜者加拿大（1-0 南非）对摩洛哥（点球淘汰荷兰）。摩洛哥防守出色，是真正的黑马，但加拿大北美主场优势与高效反击令其窄幅领先。预计低分胶着对决。

fixtures.reason_en: R32 winners Paraguay (pens Germany) vs France (3-0 Sweden). Paraguay showed resolve to beat Germany on pens but France's 3-0 demolition of Sweden shows they're in a different gear. Mbappé and Dembélé will be too much. France advance comfortably.
fixtures.reason_zh: 32 强胜者巴拉圭（点球淘汰德国）对法国（3-0 瑞典）。巴拉圭凭韧性点球淘汰德国，但法国 3-0 横扫瑞典证明其已进入另一个层次。姆巴佩与登贝莱将是决定性因素。法国轻松晋级。

groups.reason_en: Mexico 1st (9 pts, unbeaten); advanced R32 with a 2-0 win over Ecuador. South Africa eliminated R32 (0-1 Canada). Korea and Czechia out.
groups.reason_zh: 墨西哥头名（9 分，全胜）；32 强 2-0 胜厄瓜多尔晋级。南非 32 强出局（0-1 负加拿大）。韩国与捷克淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Switzerland 1st (7 pts, 3-1 Canada); Canada 2nd — advanced R32 (1-0 South Africa); Bosnia 3rd — R32 vs USA July 2. Qatar eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 瑞士头名（7 分，3-1 加拿大）；加拿大次席——32 强晋级（1-0 南非）；波黑第三——7 月 2 日 32 强战美国。卡塔尔淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Brazil 1st — R32 beat Japan 2-1 (Casemiro, Martinelli), R16 vs Norway July 5. Morocco 2nd — R32 beat Netherlands on pens, R16 vs Canada July 4. Scotland and Haiti out.
groups.reason_zh: 巴西头名——32 强 2-1 胜日本（卡塞米罗、马丁内利），16 强 7 月 5 日战挪威。摩洛哥次席——32 强点球胜荷兰，16 强 7 月 4 日战加拿大。苏格兰与海地淘汰。

groups.reason_en: USA 1st — R32 vs Bosnia July 2; Australia 2nd — R32 vs Egypt July 3; Paraguay 3rd — R32 beat Germany on pens, R16 vs France July 4. Turkey eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 美国头名——7 月 2 日 32 强战波黑；澳大利亚次席——7 月 3 日 32 强战埃及；巴拉圭第三——32 强点球淘汰德国，16 强 7 月 4 日战法国。土耳其淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Belgium 1st — R32 vs Senegal today; Egypt 2nd — R32 vs Australia July 3. Iran and New Zealand eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 比利时头名——今日 32 强战塞内加尔；埃及次席——7 月 3 日 32 强战澳大利亚。伊朗与新西兰淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Spain 1st — R32 vs Austria July 2; Cape Verde 2nd — R32 vs Argentina July 3. Uruguay and Saudi Arabia eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 西班牙头名——7 月 2 日 32 强战奥地利；佛得角次席——7 月 3 日 32 强战阿根廷。乌拉圭与沙特淘汰。

groups.reason_en: France 1st — R32 beat Sweden 3-0 (Mbappé brace), R16 vs Paraguay July 4. Norway 2nd — R32 beat Ivory Coast 2-1 (Haaland), R16 vs Brazil July 5. Senegal 3rd — R32 vs Belgium today. Iraq eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 法国头名——32 强 3-0 胜瑞典（姆巴佩梅开二度），16 强 7 月 4 日战巴拉圭。挪威次席——32 强 2-1 胜科特迪瓦（哈兰德），16 强 7 月 5 日战巴西。塞内加尔第三——今日 32 强战比利时。伊拉克淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Argentina 1st — R32 vs Cape Verde July 3; Austria 2nd — R32 vs Spain July 2; Algeria 3rd — R32 vs Switzerland July 3. Jordan eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 阿根廷头名——7 月 3 日 32 强战佛得角；奥地利次席——7 月 2 日 32 强战西班牙；阿尔及利亚第三——7 月 3 日 32 强战瑞士。约旦淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Colombia 1st — R32 vs Ghana July 4; Portugal 2nd — R32 vs Croatia July 2; DR Congo 3rd — R32 vs England today. Uzbekistan eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 哥伦比亚头名——7 月 4 日 32 强战加纳；葡萄牙次席——7 月 2 日 32 强战克罗地亚；刚果（金）第三——今日 32 强战英格兰。乌兹别克斯坦淘汰。

groups.reason_en: England 1st — R32 vs DR Congo today; Croatia 2nd — R32 vs Portugal July 2; Ghana 3rd — R32 vs Colombia July 4. Panama eliminated (0 goals).
groups.reason_zh: 英格兰头名——今日 32 强战刚果（金）；克罗地亚次席——7 月 2 日 32 强战葡萄牙；加纳第三——7 月 4 日 32 强战哥伦比亚。巴拿马淘汰（0 进球）。
